## What changed

Describe the focused change.

## Why

Explain the user or maintainer problem and the expected impact.

## Validation

List the exact checks and manual testing performed. Include responsive evidence for UI changes, but never include credentials or real user data.

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched for overlapping issues and pull requests.
- [ ] Authorization, privacy, and moderation boundaries remain enforced on the server.
- [ ] I added or updated relevant tests and documentation.
- [ ] I ran the checks documented in `README.md`.
- [ ] This change contains no secrets, private state, build output, or unrelated files.
